Promoted from prose to structured field 2026-05-17 SPR-087 (WS-047 hygiene) so /next Step 2-prereq dampens P=15 × 0.25 = 3.75 rather than surfacing as a clean ship-ready candidate. Clear this note once owner runs the Gate 4 demo and ratifies go/no-go.

WS-182.title: Action primitive collapse — recordSeatAction(seat, intent) makes CHECK-while-owing structurally unrepresentable (replaces dispatch-boundary validator approach)

source.user_request: 2026-05-11 — owner reported SB allowed to CHECK preflop while owing chips. 2026-05-12 reframe: 'A, why does this require such an advanced solution? The primitives here are $ in a pot, bets must be matched to be in a hand. The small blind is a forced bet. A check being available when you havent matched the bet should be impossible at the primitive level.'

files_involved: src/hooks/useGameHandlers.js (migrate checkAround / restFold / any direct dispatch)
src/constants/primitiveActions.js (no constant changes — labels preserved as outputs)

WS-184.title: Camera capture — accept-button failure modes (silent fail + active errors + dropped actions) + memory-error UX (downscale source before crop)

source.user_request:
2026-05-11 — owner: "The photo capture appeared to have two bugs. first,
it stated photo capture unsuccessful error (memory) or something. Then
it failed silently after a picture was taken, cropped and accepted. It
just never attached to the player, or isn't displayed anywhere properly."

2026-05-12 — owner extended scope: "there are silent failures and active
errors on players camera feature after trying to hit accept. Sometimes
it drops the action completely." Added Bugs C + D + E and the FSM-refactor
common root-cause framing.

enables: WS-187 (avatar = photo direction change) — needs working capture path to validate
files_involved: src/components/ui/IdentityAvatar.jsx (verify photoOverlay render path is hit by saved photo)

WS-185.title: Postflop EV-bucket display — mutually-exclusive bucket groups must sum to exactly 100%

source.user_request: 2026-05-11 — owner reported 'Postflop lessons highlights that the EV buckets needs to add up to 100% for accuracy. Not every EV bucket is mutually exclusive, but the ones that are need to sum to 100% so players can see'

WS-186.title: Table flip (180°) — press-hold table center → confirm flip → render-time transform of all positional badges as a unit (no game-state mutation)

source.user_request: 2026-05-11 — owner requested 'an option to change the view of the table by rotating it, after press-hold and then confirming the rotation. A player in this way is given a little less need to think spatially about the players when trying to place seat number or where the action needs to be entered and where.'

blocked_by: refactor-sprint-2026-05-10 Items 1+2+3+4 — Refactor Sprint charter ratification 4 ('no new features during this sprint') blocks all feature work until Item 4 (decision-system extraction) completes. Bug fixes are exempt; this is not a bug.

WS-194.title: Engine refactor — per-combo villainStrengthBucket at showdown (Basin prereq)

source.user_request: 2026-05-18 — owner: 'Sounds like we need to redo some engine plumbing. The equity at the river has no variance, just variation in what they down [show] down with. We go from a % against their range, to a equity that is instead % of times they turn over a hand that beats them. We should still bucket them, since that informs potential bluffs. But the equity shouldn't be a variance based number beyond range fluctuations.'

WS-212.title: Kit upgrade 3.5.0 → 3.8.0 — install missing cwos-* script suite (run from HomeBase)

source.conversation: Founder asked whether /adopt runs here or from HomeBase after recurring kit/scripts-absent friction (fr-014)

WS-212.blocked_by_note: Cannot run autonomously in this repo. /kit-upgrade operates on the repo's own kit/scripts/cwos-kit-upgrade.js, which is absent (the whole problem) — so it can't bootstrap here. Must be initiated from a Claude Code session rooted in HomeBase (C:/Users/chris/Claude HomeBase) via /adopt --update (Step 1), then optionally /kit-upgrade in-repo (Step 2). Founder-driven meta-task; do not surface as an autonomous-execution candidate.
files_involved: .claude/commands/ + .claude/skills/ (HomeBase-authored surfaces refreshed; .kit-update sidecars for customized files)
